Sugar, Milk Solids, Milk Fat, Vitamin A Palmitate, Vitamin D3 and Vitamin B1 (Thiamine Hydrochloride)

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Milk Powder, Palm Olien, Sugar, Maltodextrin, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin (INS 322i)), Stabilizers (Disodium Phosphate (INS339ii), Monosodium Phosphate (INS339i), Carrageenan (INS 407), Vitamin A & D
metaData.Preparation: Use for preparation of coffee, tea etc.

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Milk Solids, Vegetable Fat, Dextrine, Vitamin A Palmitate, Vitamin D3, Vitamin B1 (Thamine Hydrochloride)
• Contains milk and may contain traces of soy
metaData.Key Information: Marigold Dawn sweetened beverage creamer gives a cup of coffee a smooth and creamy taste for a truly aromatic experience, making it the No.1 choice amongst our local coffee masters.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Add into coffee/tea
2. Drizzle over toast, man tous, prata
3. Use in lime pies
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep in cool and dry place
• Shake well before opening
• Refrigerate after opening
